description_long: This is a modern wristwatch featuring a round, metallic case with a brushed silver finish and a black dial. The dial is minimalist, with silver hour markers and hands, a date window at the 3 o'clock position, and a subtle brand logo beneath the 12 o'clock marker. The watch is paired with a black strap that appears to be made of rubber or silicone, secured with a traditional buckle. The crown is positioned on the right side of the case, allowing for manual adjustment of time and date. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, suitable for both casual and formal urban settings.
description: A sleek, modern wristwatch with a silver case, black dial, and black rubber strap, featuring minimalist markers and a date window.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black dial with silver markers, hands, date window, and brand logo.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the metallic case, the crown, and the curvature of the strap.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the black strap and the buckle closure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the case profile and strap attachment, without the crown visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, stylized emblem and text logo are present below the 12 o'clock marker on the dial.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is minimalist with a black background, silver stick indices for hour markers, slim silver hands, and a date window at 3 o'clock. The design is clean and modern, with no subdials or decorative textures.
attribute_strap_type: Black rubber or silicone strap with a smooth finish and multiple adjustment holes.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with three hands (hour, minute, second) and a date window at 3 o'clock; no digital elements or additional complications.
